faq.q: What are the best tours in Pigeon Forge for first-time visitors?
faq.a: Most first-time visitors do best with one broad sightseeing experience, one neighborhood or food block, and one standout attraction or day trip.

faq.q: How many days should you spend in Pigeon Forge?
faq.a: A practical first visit is usually 2 to 4 days depending on how many major attractions, shows, or day trips you want to fit into one trip.
